title: entity.graph.versioned.v1 payload
description: Payload of the entity.graph.versioned.v1 event — notification that an entity-canonicalization graph version was produced by entity-resolution-service. Thin notification projection; the full entity graph itself is owned/stored by entity-resolution-service, not carried here.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Existing vs new events' (w4-10 Contracts Steward deliverable — 'entity.graph.versioned.v1' listed as NEW); docs/architecture/api-event-contracts.md 'PROPOSED' topic promoted to Wave 4 CONFIRMED-for-implementation by wave4-plan.md (events/catalog/README.md 'Finalize PROPOSED topics via ADR before implementation' obligation satisfied by the Wave 4 authority doc, analogous to prior-wave plan-approval ADR citations). Producer entity-resolution-service (services/intelligence/entity-resolution-service/README.md 'Published events: entity.graph.versioned.v1 (PROPOSED)'); consumes demand.graph.versioned.v1. Shape mirrors demand.graph.versioned.v1 (sibling '<domain>.graph.versioned.v1' notification family — same project_id/graph_version/*_count/provenance_ref convention) per this catalog's established practice of reusing a shared shape across sibling events (cf. quality.gate.passed/failed sharing quality-gate-result.schema.json).

project_id.$comment: core business identifier (api-event-contracts.md); entity graph is project-scoped, consuming demand-graph's project-scoped output.

graph_version.$comment: Opaque version token for this entity-graph build; idempotency key component (contract-catalog.md:40 EntityRecord 'entity_id+graph_version' precedent).

entity_count.$comment: Number of canonical entities resolved in this graph version.

provenance_ref.$comment: Content-addressed hash anchoring the graph version's build provenance (sole ledger anchor, mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash / demand-graph-versioned.provenance_ref).
